reviews.comment:
Baños limpios y buena atención en el Full. Ideal para parar y seguir viaje

(Translated by Google)
Clean restrooms and good service at the Full. Ideal for a stopover before continuing your journey
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoaWJtc29BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muchísima espera para cargar combustible (50 minutos). No funcionaba la mitad de los surtidores. Además son antiguos y lentos. En un fin de semana no tuvieron previsión y no tenían nafta super

(Translated by Google)
Extremely long waits to fill up (50 minutes). Half the pumps weren't working. They're also old and slow. On a weekend, they didn't plan ahead and didn't have premium gasoline.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoc1pIbjl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Es la mejor estación de servicio que encontramos en toda la ruta, calidad, servicio,  atención, respeto y  la limpieza.

(Translated by Google)
It's the best gas station we found on the entire route, in terms of quality, service, attention, respect, and cleanliness.

Excellent service.
They should have more staff working during the summer.

reviews.comment:
Nunca hay nadie para atender y se forman filas donde hay que esperar más de media hora

(Translated by Google)
There's never anyone to help, and queues form where you have to wait for more than half an hour.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNobm9TNHh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Si le pudiera dar 0 estrellas se la daría. Demasiada demora de atención, y observa bien los carteles de los surtidores porque  solo 2 surtidores tienen infinia. Esto no es nuevo, hace años vivo pasando por esta estación.

(Translated by Google)
If I could give it 0 stars, I would. Too much delay in service, and pay close attention to the pump signs because only two pumps have infinity. This isn't new; I've been driving past this station for years.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoN3Bxc0tREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente todo, todo. Las cabañas la atención la estación de servicio. Super amables y muy bien atendido. Excelente

(Translated by Google)
Everything was excellent, everything. The cabins, the service, and the gas station. Super friendly and very well-served. Excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoanZXWUhREAE
